pricing.title: Loops - Pricing
pricing.text:
Loops - Pricing
Pricing
Our pricing is based on subscribed contacts synced to Loops. Move the slider to estimate pricing. If you need a custom plan, please
send us an email
.
How many subscribers do you have?
100
1.5m+
1,000
Subscribers
Free
Per month
Early Stage Plan
The free plan is for early products and smaller audiences.
Get started
Up to 4,000 sends/month (enough for weekly emails)
All features included
Includes a small "Powered by Loops" footer
Need a custom solution? Contact us
→
Framer
Replicate
unDraw
perplexity
Modal
clerk
wabi
Spline
Linear
Reuters
Frequently Asked Questions
Wait, what's your price again?
Our pricing is based on subscribed contacts. Transactional email sending is included at no additional charge.
How is a subscriber defined?
A subscribed contact is an email address marked as subscribed. You can view all subscribed and unsubscribed contacts on your Audience page.
What does the free plan include?
The free plan includes up to 4,000 sends a month to 1,000 stored subscribed contacts. We do not charge for additional stored contacts. It also includes Loops branding at the bottom of your emails. Any paid plan will remove these limitations.
Do you charge for team seats?
No.
Do you charge for email sends?
No.
How are you different from other email platforms?
Sending email for your business is important and will have a material impact long term. You should take a look at all your options and go with what's best for your business.
Loops is free to start, with no credit card required and you can invite your entire team to help you make a decision. We believe we've built the best tool in our class. If you need to send email for your SaaS, we can confidently say Loops is likely the right choice.

analysis.name: Loops
analysis.value_proposition: The simplest way to send product, marketing, and transactional email for SaaS teams, from waitlist to IPO.
analysis.ideal_customer: SaaS founders and growth teams who want a single, developer-friendly email platform without per-seat or per-send charges

features.name: email editor
features.description: Visual email editor that renders correctly across all supported email clients
features.evidence_quote: Designs crafted with Loops will work in all supported email clients. Easy.

features.name: email themes
features.description: Customizable themes controlling background, padding, border radius, and border color
features.evidence_quote: Themes — background #1C1917, padding 24px, border 1px solid, radius 6px

features.name: marketing campaigns
features.description: One-time broadcast email campaigns to audience segments

features.name: transactional email
features.description: API-triggered transactional emails sent programmatically, included at no extra cost
features.evidence_quote: Transactional email sending is included at no additional charge.

features.name: lifecycle workflows
features.description: Automated multi-step email sequences with triggers, timers, branches, and filters
features.evidence_quote: Build powerful lifecycle workflows — Trigger userCreated, Timer 5 mins, Send welcome email, Branch

features.name: workflow builder
features.description: Visual loop/flow builder for constructing automation sequences with zoom support
features.evidence_quote: Introducing Workflows — May 7, 2026; Zoom in the loop builder — Apr 1, 2026

features.name: contacts api
features.description: REST API for creating and managing contacts with properties and subscription status

features.name: events api
features.description: API for tracking user events that can trigger automated email workflows

features.name: contact properties
features.description: Custom properties attached to contacts for segmentation and personalization
features.evidence_quote: We have contacts, contact properties, events and event properties.

features.name: event properties
features.description: Custom properties on events enabling fine-grained segmentation and filtering

features.name: segments and filters
features.description: Dynamic audience segments built from contact properties and email engagement
features.evidence_quote: Build segments from properties and engagement, reuse them across campaigns and workflows

features.name: saved segments
features.description: Persistent, reusable segment definitions that stay in sync with product data
features.evidence_quote: Saved segments — Paying Customers 1,240 / Recent Signups 850 / Didn't open last campaign 125

features.name: mailing lists
features.description: Subscription list management and subscriber preference handling

features.name: subscription preferences
features.description: Subscriber-facing preference center for managing opt-ins per list
features.evidence_quote: Lists, Preferences and Slack Notifications — Jul 2, 2024

features.name: double opt-in
features.description: Confirmed opt-in flow requiring subscribers to verify their email address

features.name: goal conversions tracking
features.description: Track email-driven upgrade, churn, and revenue outcomes per campaign/workflow
features.evidence_quote: Connect Loops to your app and track what emails drive upgrades, churn reduction, and revenue.

features.name: a/b split testing
features.description: Experiment framework for testing email variants against conversion goals

features.name: reusable components
features.description: Library of reusable email blocks shared across templates and campaigns

features.name: multi-column layouts
features.description: Side-by-side column layout support in the email editor

features.name: code blocks in editor
features.description: Formatted code block rendering inside email body content
features.evidence_quote: Code blocks in the editor — Apr 3, 2026

features.name: markdown support
features.description: Markdown syntax support for composing email content

features.name: llm translation
features.description: AI-powered automatic translation of email content into other languages

features.name: guardian
features.description: Deliverability and compliance protection system (exact scope unpublished)

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Outbound webhooks triggered by email and contact events
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks, Personal Blocklist and CC/BCC — Feb 5, 2025

features.name: cc/bcc support
features.description: CC and BCC recipient fields on outbound emails
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks, Personal Blocklist and CC/BCC — Feb 5, 2025

features.name: personal blocklist
features.description: Per-account suppression list for blocking specific email addresses
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks, Personal Blocklist and CC/BCC — Feb 5, 2025

features.name: sending domain setup
features.description: Custom domain authentication for improved deliverability

features.name: dns zone file generation
features.description: Auto-generates DNS zone file records for domain authentication

features.name: deliverability tools
features.description: Guides and built-in tooling for improving inbox placement rates
features.evidence_quote: Improve your inbox placement — Read our guide for improving your email deliverability

features.name: smtp
features.description: SMTP relay endpoint as an alternative to API sending

features.name: sdks
features.description: Official client SDKs for Node/JS, TypeScript, Ruby, PHP, Go, and Nuxt
features.evidence_quote: Go, JavaScript, Nuxt, PHP, Ruby — Add Loops to your application in minutes with our SDKs.

features.name: cli
features.description: Command-line interface for managing campaigns, contacts, and components
features.evidence_quote: CLI, Skills and Array support — Apr 16, 2026

features.name: agent skills
features.description: AI agent skill integrations for automated email operations

features.name: unlimited team seats
features.description: No per-seat charges; unlimited team members can be invited at no cost
features.evidence_quote: Do you charge for team seats? No.

features.name: account switcher
features.description: Switch between multiple Loops accounts from a single login

features.name: slack notifications
features.description: Slack alerts triggered by email or contact events
features.evidence_quote: Lists, Preferences and Slack Notifications — Jul 2, 2024

features.name: language support
features.description: Multi-language UI or content support for international sending

features.name: soc2 certification
features.description: SOC2 compliance certification available for security review

features.name: data processing agreement
features.description: DPA and Data Privacy Framework documentation for GDPR/compliance

features.name: email templates
features.description: Pre-built email templates gallery for common use cases

features.name: playbooks
features.description: Pre-configured workflow recipes for common lifecycle automation patterns

features.name: powered-by branding removal
features.description: Remove 'Powered by Loops' footer badge on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: Includes a small 'Powered by Loops' footer... Any paid plan will remove these limitations.

differentiators: No per-seat pricing — unlimited team members at all tiers
No per-send pricing — contact-count-based billing only
Transactional email included at no additional charge
All features available on free plan (no feature gating)
Single platform for product, marketing, and transactional email

recent_ships.what: DNS zone file auto-generation for sending domain setup

recent_ships.source: Zoom in the loop builder — Apr 1, 2026

recent_ships.what: New Stripe billing events supported as workflow triggers
Markdown support and additional editor improvements
A/B split testing for email campaigns
Webhooks, personal blocklist, and CC/BCC support
recent_ships.source: Webhooks, Personal Blocklist and CC/BCC — Feb 5, 2025

praised: "Loops is focused, fast, and does just what we need" — Jorn, Founder, Framer
"Loops is super simple, intuitive, and has what we need without the bloat" — Luca, Founder, Cosmos

free_tier.limits: 1,000 subscribed contacts; 4,000 sends/month; Loops branding in footer

tiers.name: Free (Early Stage Plan)
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1,000 contacts, 4,000 sends/mo, all features, Loops branding footer

tiers.name: Paid (contact-volume slider)
tiers.headline_inclusions: All features, no send limits, no seat limits, no Loops branding; price scales with subscriber count

pricing.notes: Pricing is contact-count-based via an interactive slider — specific dollar amounts were not rendered in scraped content. No seat fees. No email send fees. Transactional email included at all tiers. Custom plans available on request.
